blockingIssues.description: Missing dedicated /recover/{profileId}/reveal route in CoreRoutes; only collect and success routes exist.
Missing recover-reveal-nsec DemoGallery scenario, so required reveal step cannot be validated.
Recover success route currently renders reveal/security-warning UI instead of success confirmation content and CTA.
Collect shares screen lacks expected password fields and threshold-progress section required by feature contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile Recover flow shape across mission artifacts so feature expectedBehavior, AGENTS guidance, validation-contract assertions, and Paper references define the same screen set.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: features.json and AGENTS.md describe a 3-step recover flow (collect/reveal/success), while validation-contract and Paper references cover collect and success only; this mismatch caused a completed implementation to pass local checks but fail scrutiny feature contract review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit escalation rule: when feature expectedBehavior conflicts with validation-contract/Paper, workers must return to orchestrator instead of silently narrowing scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: recover-fidelity handoff documented omission of /reveal due to Paper/contract mismatch, yet feature metadata still required it; lack of enforced escalation allowed contract drift to pass implementation phase.
